'''鈭歝h-h-zh''' ('''chahazha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:immaterialize|immaterialize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-h-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:immaterialize|immaterialize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-h-zh
|-
! Lemma
| chahazha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chahazhithi|chahazhithi]] || [[word:chahazhiji|chahazhiji]] || [[word:chahazhishi|chahazhishi]] || [[word:chahazhi|chahazhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chahazhuthuth|chahazhuthuth]] || [[word:chahazhujuj|chahazhujuj]] || [[word:chahazhushush|chahazhushush]] || [[word:chahazh|chahazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chahazhuthu|chahazhuthu]] || [[word:chahazhuju|chahazhuju]] || [[word:chahazhushu|chahazhushu]] || [[word:chahazhu|chahazhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chahazhufuth|chahazhufuth]] || [[word:chahazhufuj|chahazhufuj]] || [[word:chahazhufush|chahazhufush]] || [[word:chahazhuf|chahazhuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chahazhethe|chahazhethe]] || [[word:chahazheje|chahazheje]] || [[word:chahazheshe|chahazheshe]] || [[word:chahazhe|chahazhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chahazhothoth|chahazhothoth]] || [[word:chahazhojoj|chahazhojoj]] || [[word:chahazhoshosh|chahazhoshosh]] || [[word:chahazh|chahazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chahazhotho|chahazhotho]] || [[word:chahazhojo|chahazhojo]] || [[word:chahazhosho|chahazhosho]] || [[word:chahazho|chahazho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chahazhofoth|chahazhofoth]] || [[word:chahazhofoj|chahazhofoj]] || [[word:chahazhofosh|chahazhofosh]] || [[word:chahazhof|chahazhof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chahazh忙th忙|chahazh忙th忙]] || [[word:chahazh忙j忙|chahazh忙j忙]] || [[word:chahazh忙sh忙|chahazh忙sh忙]] || [[word:chahazh忙|chahazh忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chahazhathath|chahazhathath]] || [[word:chahazhajaj|chahazhajaj]] || [[word:chahazhashash|chahazhashash]] || [[word:chahazh|chahazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chahazhatha|chahazhatha]] || [[word:chahazhaja|chahazhaja]] || [[word:chahazhasha|chahazhasha]] || [[word:chahazha|chahazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chahazhafath|chahazhafath]] || [[word:chahazhafaj|chahazhafaj]] || [[word:chahazhafash|chahazhafash]] || [[word:chahazhaf|chahazhaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:chahazhasha|chahazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gochahazhasha|gochahazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokichahazhasha|gokichahazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:chahazhn眉sha|chahazhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gochahazhnkn眉sha|gochahazhnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokichahazhn眉sha|gokichahazhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chahazhsh毛sha|chahazhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochahazhnksh毛sha|gochahazhnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichahazhsh毛sha|gokichahazhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chahazhrosha|chahazhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochahazhnkrosha|gochahazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichahazhrosha|gokichahazhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chahazhmusha|chahazhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gochahazhnkmusha|gochahazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichahazhmusha|gokichahazhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:chahazhsherasha|chahazhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gochahazhnksherasha|gochahazhnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokichahazhsherasha|gokichahazhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:chahazhngasha|chahazhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gochahazhnkngasha|gochahazhnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokichahazhngasha|gokichahazhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chahazhyasha|chahazhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gochahazhnkyasha|gochahazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokichahazhyasha|gokichahazhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:chahazhyamasha|chahazhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gochahazhnkyamasha|gochahazhnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokichahazhyamasha|gokichahazhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:chahazhn眉sh毛sha|chahazhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gochahazhnkn眉sh毛sha|gochahazhnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokichahazhn眉sh毛sha|gokichahazhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:chahazhn眉rosha|chahazhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochahazhnkn眉rosha|gochahazhnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichahazhn眉rosha|gokichahazhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chahazhn眉musha|chahazhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochahazhnkn眉musha|gochahazhnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichahazhn眉musha|gokichahazhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:chahazhsh毛n眉sha|chahazhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gochahazhnksh毛n眉sha|gochahazhnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokichahazhsh毛n眉sha|gokichahazhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:chahazhsh毛rosha|chahazhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochahazhnksh毛rosha|gochahazhnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichahazhsh毛rosha|gokichahazhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chahazhsh毛musha|chahazhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochahazhnksh毛musha|gochahazhnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichahazhsh毛musha|gokichahazhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:chahazhron眉sha|chahazhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gochahazhnkron眉sha|gochahazhnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokichahazhron眉sha|gokichahazhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:chahazhrosh毛sha|chahazhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gochahazhnkrosh毛sha|gochahazhnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokichahazhrosh毛sha|gokichahazhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chahazhromusha|chahazhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochahazhnkromusha|gochahazhnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichahazhromusha|gokichahazhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:chahazhmun眉sha|chahazhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gochahazhnkmun眉sha|gochahazhnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokichahazhmun眉sha|gokichahazhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:chahazhmush毛sha|chahazhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gochahazhnkmush毛sha|gochahazhnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokichahazhmush毛sha|gokichahazhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:chahazhmurosha|chahazhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochahazhnkmurosha|gochahazhnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichahazhmurosha|gokichahazhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:chahazh|chahazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ch忙h忙zh|ch忙h忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hochahazh|hochahazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoch忙h忙zh|hoch忙h忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohochahazh|hohochahazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoch忙h忙zh|hohoch忙h忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉chahazh|n眉chahazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉ch忙h忙zh|n眉ch忙h忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉chahazh|n眉n眉chahazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ch忙h忙zh|n眉n眉ch忙h忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂chahazh|n茂chahazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂ch忙h忙zh|n茂ch忙h忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂chahazh|n茂n茂chahazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ch忙h忙zh|n茂n茂ch忙h忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luchahazh|luchahazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luch忙h忙zh|luch忙h忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluchahazh|luluchahazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluch忙h忙zh|luluch忙h忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lichahazh|lichahazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lich忙h忙zh|lich忙h忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilichahazh|lilichahazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilich忙h忙zh|lilich忙h忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kochahazh|kochahazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koch忙h忙zh|koch忙h忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokochahazh|kokochahazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoch忙h忙zh|kokoch忙h忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kechahazh|kechahazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kech忙h忙zh|kech忙h忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekechahazh|kekechahazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekech忙h忙zh|kekech忙h忙zh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
